description: Canonical FreeIdeaStore idea playbooks. MCP exposes these through list_idea_skills, get_idea_skill, and apply_idea_skill.

skills.title: Idea Flow Orchestrator
skills.summary: Choose the right next skill and publishing action for a raw prompt, existing idea, research request, or pro-candidate request.

skills.title: Idea Interviewer
skills.summary: Turn a vague idea into enough structured context to publish a useful first page.

skills.title: Idea Document Architect
skills.summary: Turn the user's first prompt or short interview answers into a coherent generic FreeIdeaStore public idea document.

skills.title: Idea Critic
skills.summary: Pressure-test assumptions, blockers, safety, trust, cost, and reasons to trash or narrow an idea.

skills.title: Competitor Finder
skills.summary: Find direct competitors, indirect substitutes, and manual workarounds before an idea is treated as novel.

skills.title: Idea Researcher
skills.summary: Convert public evidence and source-backed observations into useful idea history.

skills.title: Idea Refiner
skills.summary: Merge useful history into a clearer canonical public idea document.

skills.title: Pivot Generator
skills.summary: Find sharper customer, market, product, or format alternatives when the original idea is too broad or risky.

skills.title: Validation Planner
skills.summary: Turn an idea into a cheap validation plan that can prove, narrow, pivot, or trash it quickly.

skills.title: Prototype Planner
skills.summary: Define the smallest prototype that can test the idea's core workflow without pretending the full product exists.

skills.title: Pro Candidate Assessor
skills.summary: Decide whether an idea deserves ProIdeaStore diligence or should stay in FreeIdeaStore.
